epics.name: Systematic trading process
epics.vision: A systematic trading process which coherently synthesizes market and economic information into signals which are evaluated and tested for confidence and probability over a range of timeframes, the best of which can be expressed in terms of risk positioned within the market when defined entry criteria are met and closed when any of a range of possible exit criteria are met.

epics.name: Categorization of Photos Taken
epics.vision: As a professional photographer, I want to have a database which allows me to easily know what photos are in a roll, which locations a roll was shot in, the roll type, subjects, etc

epics.name: Spreadsheet setup
epics.vision: Rename and enter first roll into spreadsheet

epics.name: Algebra fundamentals
epics.vision: Build strong foundation in algebra for finance and trading applications

epics.name: Surfing progression
epics.vision: Improve surfing technique and confidence in larger waves

stories.name: Create photo categorization system
stories.description: As a photographer, I want to categorize photos by location, subject, and roll type so that I can easily find specific images
stories.actionItem: Design and implement spreadsheet structure with categories

stories.name: Photobase V1 setup
stories.description: As a photographer, I want to set up the initial photo database so that I can start organizing my work
stories.actionItem: Rename and enter first roll into spreadsheet

stories.name: Research pipeline development
stories.description: As a trader, I want a multifaceted research pipeline which highlights relevant trends in the market and extracts and synthesizes signal from the confluence of the various research streams
stories.actionItem: Set up basic research workflow and data sources

stories.name: Complete algebra basics
stories.description: As a learner, I want to master algebra fundamentals so that I can apply them to finance and trading
stories.actionItem: Work through algebra problem sets and examples

dailyLogs.notes: Good progress on photo database. Algebra session was shorter than planned but productive.
